column1: - Wireless Module (pick ONE — bluetooth OR wifi)

column2: Bluetooth Module HC-05 (works with bluetooth-classic clients on Win/Linux/Android — macOS support is poor due to deprecated SPP)
(see WiFi Adapter section below for the wifi alternative)

column1: - WiFi Adapter (optional alternative to HC-05 — pin-compatible drop-in)

column2: Build path: send 4-wireless/wifi/pcb/jlcpcb-package/ to JLCPCB with SMT-only PCB Assembly enabled. JLC factory-assembles U1 (only SMD part); you hand-solder the 6 THT parts below after boards arrive (~5 min each).
Total cost target: ~$20-25 for 5 boards delivered. Bare ESP-01S module is sourced separately (AliExpress; not stocked at Mouser).
SMD (factory-soldered by JLCPCB SMT line — JLC sources from their library using LCSC C6186):
AMS1117-3.3 LDO 3.3V regulator SOT-223 — factory-assembled by JLC PCBA
THT (you solder these by hand — leaded through-hole
100nF disc ceramic 50V (WiFi adapter — same part as main board cap group)
PN2222A NPN TO-92 (WiFi adapter — STATE-LED level shifter)
6mm tactile switch THT 4-pin (WiFi adapter — AP-mode reset button)
1x6 male pin header RIGHT-ANGLE 2.54mm pitch — plugs into MK-312 HC-05 socket on mainboard
2x4 FEMALE socket header 2.54mm pitch — ESP-01S module plugs in here
ESP-01S WiFi module (NOT stocked at Mouser — buy from AliExpress / Amazon ~$2 each)

column1: - PC Link Cable (optional — required only for clients that talk to the LINK port instead of bluetooth/wifi adapter)

column2: DSD TECH USB to RS232 cable (FT232RL chip) — connects PC to MK-312 LINK port; works with mk312-gui / three-twelve-bee / ErosWeb on Win/Mac/Linux
Component tester (multi-function — measures MOSFET threshold voltage Vt for matching IRL520 / IRF9Z24 to prevent Error 20; also tests resistors, caps, diodes, transistors)
USBASP for ISP + 10Pin to 6Pin Adapter Board
USB to TTL 5PIN Serial Converter (for HC-05 AT-mode config flashing)
